positive: A mesmerizing mandala pattern blending deep space constellations with stylized tropical flora. Focus on vibrant bioluminescent glowing vines wrapping around geometric, celestial bodies like Saturn's rings and stylized crescent moons. The design should feature thick, clean outlines and striking contrast, resembling illuminated linocut prints or high-detail graphic vectors. Use a limited, jewel-toned color palette (deep sapphire, emerald green, gold, and electric teal). The composition must be central, symmetrical, and highly repeatable, ensuring clean silhouettes ideal for screen printing on apparel. Style: Neo-geometric, Cosmic Boho, detailed etching.
negative: blur, text, logo, watermark, signature, artifacts, poor anatomy, low detail, grainy, noise, monochrome, gradients, photo-realistic, messy, clutter, childish
